creator: jim@kol.com.cn
text:
Hello
   I need you help.
   Recently, I try to install FreeBSD 2.2.2 Release into a P166, 16M ,
 Quantum 640M, 3com 3c509 nic. But if I installed from dos partition, I
 would meet a problem of " Write failure on transfer! (wrote -1 byte of
 1024)". if I installed from ftp or nfs( We have Sun machine in our Co.), I=
 couldn't ping the machine. I had configured it by using IP and correct=
 gateway, DNS and the boot program can check the nic correctly. What's the=
 problem? Could you answer me?
  Thanks for your kind help.

Best Regards
